Triggers and actions for Outseta CRM and: Triggers and actions for Outseta CRM and Billing
Your full Outseta domain URL, e.g. https: Your full Outseta domain URL, e.g. https://yourcompany.outseta.com
Found in Outseta → Settings → Integratio: Found in Outseta → Settings → Integrations → API
Found alongside your API Key in Outseta: Found alongside your API Key in Outseta → Settings → Integrations → API
Connect Activepieces to your Outseta acc:
Connect Activepieces to your Outseta account using the Admin API.

**To get your credentials:**
1. Log in to your Outseta account
2. Go to **Settings → Integrations → API**
3. Copy your **API Key** and **API Secret**
4. Your domain is your Outseta subdomain, e.g. `https://yourcompany.outseta.com`

Need help? See [Outseta API docs](https://documenter.getpostman.com/view/3613332/outseta-rest-api-v1).
Search for an account by name. If not fo: Search for an account by name. If not found, create a new one.
Search for a person by email. If not fou: Search for a person by email. If not found, create a new one.
Retrieve an Outseta account by selecting: Retrieve an Outseta account by selecting it from the dropdown.
Retrieve an Outseta person by selecting: Retrieve an Outseta person by selecting them from the dropdown.
Retrieve a deal by selecting it from the: Retrieve a deal by selecting it from the dropdown.
Retrieve the current plan and subscripti: Retrieve the current plan and subscription details for an account.
Update an existing account in Outseta.
Update an existing person in Outseta.
Create a deal and optionally associate i: Create a deal and optionally associate it with an account or a person.
Add an existing person to an existing ac: Add an existing person to an existing account.
Record a custom activity on an account,: Record a custom activity on an account, person, or deal. Activities show on the activity feed and can trigger drip campaigns.
Change an account's current subscription: Change an account's current subscription plan (upgrade, downgrade, or switch to free).
Cancel the current subscription on an ac: Cancel the current subscription on an account. By default, the subscription expires at the end of the current term. You can also cancel immediately.
Track usage for a metered (usage-based): Track usage for a metered (usage-based) add-on on an account.
Add a person's email address to a mailin: Add a person's email address to a mailing list.
Delete a deal from the CRM.
Make a custom API call to a specific end: Make a custom API call to a specific endpoint

The lifecycle stage for the account (use: The lifecycle stage for the account (used when creating).
A custom identifier for this account (e.g. your internal customer ID). Used when creating.
Email for the primary contact (used when: Email for the primary contact (used when creating).
Used when creating a new account with a: Used when creating a new account with a plan.
Email to search for. If no match is foun: Email to search for. If no match is found, a new person is created with this email.
A custom identifier you assign to this a: A custom identifier you assign to this account (e.g. your internal customer ID).
Notes that appear on invoices sent to th: Notes that appear on invoices sent to this account.
The UID of the pipeline stage for this d: The UID of the pipeline stage for this deal.
The monetary value of the deal.
The client identifier of the team member: The client identifier of the team member this deal is assigned to. Found in the person's Outseta profile.
The name or title of the deal.
Whether this person should be the primar: Whether this person should be the primary contact for the account.
The activity title. Must match the start: The activity title. Must match the start/stop value in drip campaigns if used for automation.
Select the account, person, or deal to r: Select the account, person, or deal to record the activity on.
Optional string to store serialized JSON: Optional string to store serialized JSON or other metadata with this activity.
If checked, the subscription is cancelle: If checked, the subscription is cancelled immediately. Otherwise it expires at the end of the current billing term.
Select the metered add-on. Manage add-on: Select the metered add-on. Manage add-ons in Outseta → Billing → Add-ons.
The date of usage. Defaults to now if no: The date of usage. Defaults to now if not provided.
Select the email list to subscribe to.
If checked, Outseta will send the list w: If checked, Outseta will send the list welcome email to this subscriber.
Authorization headers are injected autom: Authorization headers are injected automatically from your connection.
